## ABOUT US
EcoPlanet Bamboo is leading the industrialization of bamboo as a viable and environmentally attractive alternative fiber while addressing some of the world's most critical and pressing environmental and social concerns. The conversion of degraded land into certified bamboo farms that contribute to fighting global climate change is coupled with investment into the development of innovative technology to provide climate positive, turnkey solutions for products and markets that currently contribute to the deforestation of our world’s natural forests.
![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/9df54b_ad2242937a8246929f81e39fccf15956~mv2_d_5616_3744_s_4_2.jpg/v1/fill/w_648,h_564,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/9df54b_ad2242937a8246929f81e39fccf15956~mv2_d_5616_3744_s_4_2.jpg)
## SEED TO SALE TREE FREE FIBER
![EcoPlanet Bamboo Supply Chain.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/9df54b_8bd8d821d95542cda0694f45ea5e7ebd~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_898,h_217,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/EcoPlanet%20Bamboo%20Supply%20Chain.jpg)

## PLANTATIONS
EcoPlanet Bamboo has spent almost a decade developing bamboo plantations in carefully selected strategic locations to feed global markets. This resource base provides a secure long term supply of bamboo fiber at a scale that can transform target industries.
[LEARN MORE](https://www.ecoplanetbamboo.com/bamboo-plantations)
## INDUSTRY
EcoPlanet Bamboo is focused on an initial transformation of global paper and packaging markets through the provision of tree-free, deforestation-free product lines that can meet the highest standards of sustainability across the entire supply chain, from seed to sale.
[LEARN MORE](https://www.ecoplanetbamboo.com/bamboo-toilet-paper)
